messages.content: Hello Charles! How can I assist you today? If you have any questions about Rambo Bikes, feel free to ask!
I bought a Rambo Rebel bike a few years ago. Can you tell me when and what I paid for it? My email address is Charles A monty@gmail.com.

I'm sorry, but I don't have access to purchase records or personal information. I recommend reaching out to our customer service team at cs@rambobikes.com or calling (952) 283-0777. They will be able to assist you with your purchase details.
